text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I drink a glass of water and stretch for five minutes. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit. My work starts at 9:00; I’m a graphic designer, so I spend most of my day at the computer. Around lunchtime, I take a 30-minute walk to clear my mind. In the evening, I exercise for an hour—either jogging or yoga. Then I cook dinner, read a book, and go to bed by 10:30. This routine keeps me healthy and productive. The consistency helps me feel balanced and focused throughout the week.
